title: Sense Multus
text:
Apply it:

```bash
kubectl apply -f network.yaml
```

## Step 4: Create a Pod
Deploy a pod using the network. Save the following YAML as `pod.yaml`:

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: macvlan-pod
  namespace: <namespace>
  annotations:
    k8s.v1.cni.cncf.io/networks: macvlan-network
spec:
  containers:
  - name: test-container
    image: alpine
    command: ["sh", "-c", "sleep 3600"]
    resources:
      limits:
        memory: "256Mi"
        cpu: "500m"
      requests:
        memory: "128Mi"
        cpu: "250m"
```

Apply it:

```bash
kubectl apply -f pod.yaml
```

## Step 5: Verify Connectivity
1. Exec into the pod:

```bash
kubectl exec -it macvlan-pod -n <namespace> -- sh
```

2. Test connectivity using `ping`, `iperf` or other tools.
